Off Calendar May-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Yao Li's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $310 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
